structured_payload_candidate.title: Static Pressure Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Supply fan speed is controlled to maintain DSP at setpoint when fan is proven ON. For small Zone Groups, provide multiple sets of gains based on load indicator.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Supply fan speed is controlled to maintain DSP at setpoint when the fan is proven ON. structured_payload_candidate.title: Occupied/Setup Mode SAT Setpoint Reset
structured_payload_candidate.summary: During Occupied and Setup Modes, SAT setpoint is reset from Min_ClgSAT when OAT is OAT_Max and above, proportionally up to T-max when OAT is OAT_Min and below. T-max is reset using T&R logic between Min_ClgSAT and Max_ClgSAT.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: System in Occupied Mode or Setup Mode.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: During Occupied Mode and Setup Mode, setpoint shall be reset from Min_ClgSAT when the outdoor air temperature is OAT_Max and above, proportionally up to T-max when the outdoor air temperature is OAT_Min and below. T-max shall be reset using T&R logic (see Section 5.1.14) between Min_ClgSAT and Max_ClgSAT.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Minimum Outdoor Air Control Enable/Disable for Units with Return Fans (DP Control)
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Outdoor Air and Return Air Dampers
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Multiple-Zone VAV Air-Handling Unit with return fan and separate OA damper, DP control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Minimum outdoor air control is enabled when Occupied Mode and either economizer high limit exceeded or return damper > MRA-P for 10 minutes. Disabled when not Occupied or both conditions false for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Unit in Occupied Mode and (economizer high limit conditions exceeded OR return air damper position > MRA-P) for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Minimum outdoor air control shall be enabled when the unit is in Occupied Mode and either of the following conditions are true for 10 minutes: i. The economizer high limit conditions in Section 5.1.17 are exceeded. ii. When the minimum outdoor air damper is open and the return air damper position is greater than MRA-P. Minimum outdoor air control shall be disabled when the unit is no longer in Occupied Mode, or both of the following conditions are true for 10 minutes: i. The economizer high limit conditions in Section 5.1.17 are not exceeded. ii. The minimum outdoor air damper is closed or the return air damper position is 10% below MRA-P.
configurable_values: MRA-P (scales from 95% at 100% fan speed to 20% at minimum speed)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Minimum outdoor air control shall be enabled when the unit is in Occupied Mode and either of the following conditions are true for 10 minutes: i. The economizer high limit conditions in Section 5.1.17 are exceeded. ii. When the minimum outdoor air damper is open and the return air damper position is greater than MRA-P. Minimum outdoor air control shall be disabled when the unit is no longer in Occupied Mode, or both of the following conditions are true for 10 minutes: i. The economizer high limit conditions in Section 5.1.17 are not exceeded. ii. The minimum outdoor air damper is closed or the return air damper position is 10% below MRA-P.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Minimum Outdoor Air Control Sequence for Units with Return Fans (DP Control)
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Outdoor Air and Return Air Dampers
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Multiple-Zone VAV Air-Handling Unit with return fan and separate OA damper, DP control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When enabled, fully open return damper, wait 15 seconds, close economizer damper, wait 3 minutes, then release return damper to SAT control loop and modulate MaxRA-P to maintain DP at MinDPsp.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Minimum outdoor air control is enabled.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: When minimum outdoor air control is enabled, the normal sequencing of economizer outdoor air and return air dampers per Section 5.16.2 shall be suspended per the following sequence: i. Fully open return air damper; and ii. Wait 15 seconds, then close the economizer outdoor air damper; and iii. Wait 3 minutes, then release return air damper position for control by the SAT control loop in Section 5.16.2. Economizer outdoor air damper remains closed. iv. The maximum return air damper position endpoint MaxRA-P shall be modulated from 100% to 0% to maintain DP across the minimum outdoor air damper at setpoint MinDPsp.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When minimum outdoor air control is enabled, the normal sequencing of economizer outdoor air and return air dampers per Section 5.16.2 shall be suspended per the following sequence: i. Fully open return air damper; and ii. Wait 15 seconds, then close the economizer outdoor air damper; and iii. Wait 3 minutes, then release return air damper position for control by the SAT control loop in Section 5.16.2. Economizer outdoor air damper remains closed. iv. The maximum return air damper position endpoint MaxRA-P shall be modulated from 100% to 0% to maintain DP across the minimum outdoor air damper at setpoint MinDPsp.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Minimum Outdoor Air Control for Units with Return Fans (Single Common Damper, AFMS)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Multiple-Zone VAV Air-Handling Unit with return fan and single common damper, AFMS
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Outdoor airflow is maintained at MinOAsp by a direct-acting control loop whose output is mapped to MaxRA-P. When economizer high limit exceeded for 10 minutes, return damper is modulated directly to maintain airflow at MinOAsp.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Unit in Occupied Mode and economizer high limit conditions exceeded for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: The outdoor airflow rate shall be maintained at the minimum outdoor damper outdoor airflow setpoint MinOAsp by a direct-acting control loop whose output is mapped to the return air damper maximum position endpoint MaxRA-P. While the unit is in Occupied Mode, if the economizer high limit conditions in Section 5.1.17 are exceeded for 10 minutes, outdoor air shall be controlled to the minimum outdoor airflow. When this occurs, the normal sequencing of the return air damper by the SAT control loop is suspended, and the return air damper position shall be modulated directly to maintain measured airflow at MinOAsp (i.e. return damper position shall equal MaxRA-P). The economizer damper shall remain open.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The outdoor airflow rate shall be maintained at the minimum outdoor damper outdoor airflow setpoint MinOAsp by a direct-acting control loop whose output is mapped to the return air damper maximum position endpoint MaxRA-P. While the unit is in Occupied Mode, if the economizer high limit conditions in Section 5.1.17 are exceeded for 10 minutes, outdoor air shall be controlled to the minimum outdoor airflow. When this occurs, the normal sequencing of the return air damper by the SAT control loop is suspended, and the return air damper position shall be modulated directly to maintain measured airflow at MinOAsp (i.e. return damper position shall equal MaxRA-P). The economizer damper shall remain open.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Minimum Outdoor Air Control for Units with Relief Dampers/Fans (Single Common Damper, AFMS)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Multiple-Zone VAV Air-Handling Unit with relief dampers/fans and single common damper, AFMS
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Outdoor airflow is maintained at MinOAsp by a reverse-acting control loop mapped to MinOA-P and MaxRA-P. When economizer high limit exceeded for 10 minutes, fully open return damper, wait 15 seconds, set MaxOA-P equal to MinOA-P, wait 3 minutes, then modulate return damper to maintain airflow at MinOAsp.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Unit in Occupied Mode and economizer high limit conditions exceeded for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: The outdoor airflow rate shall be maintained at the minimum outdoor air setpoint MinOAsp by a reverse-acting control loop whose output is mapped to economizer damper minimum position MinOA-P and return air damper maximum position MaxRA-P as indicated in Figure 5.16.6.3. While the unit is in Occupied Mode, if the economizer high limit conditions in Section 5.1.17 are exceeded for 10 minutes, outdoor airflow shall be controlled to the minimum outdoor airflow setpoint, MinOAsp. When this occurs, the normal sequencing of the return air damper by the SAT control loop is suspended as follows: i. Fully open the return air damper ii. Wait 15 seconds, then set MaxOA-P equal to MinOA-P iii. Wait 3 minutes, then modulate the return air damper to maintain the measured airflow at MinOAsp (i.e. return air damper position shall equal MaxRA-P).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The outdoor airflow rate shall be maintained at the minimum outdoor air setpoint MinOAsp by a reverse-acting control loop whose output is mapped to economizer damper minimum position MinOA-P and return air damper maximum position MaxRA-P as indicated in Figure 5.16.6.3. While the unit is in Occupied Mode, if the economizer high limit conditions in Section 5.1.17 are exceeded for 10 minutes, outdoor airflow shall be controlled to the minimum outdoor airflow setpoint, MinOAsp. When this occurs, the normal sequencing of the return air damper by the SAT control loop is suspended as follows: i. Fully open the return air damper ii. Wait 15 seconds, then set MaxOA-P equal to MinOA-P iii. Wait 3 minutes, then modulate the return air damper to maintain the measured airflow at MinOAsp (i.e. return air damper position shall equal MaxRA-P).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Minimum Outdoor Air Control Release for Units with Relief Dampers/Fans (Single Common Damper, AFMS)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Multiple-Zone VAV Air-Handling Unit with relief dampers/fans and single common damper, AFMS
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If economizer high limit conditions are not exceeded for 10 minutes or unit not in Occupied Mode, set MaxOA-P = 100% and release return damper to SAT control loop.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Economizer high limit conditions not exceeded for 10 minutes or unit no longer in Occupied Mode.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: If the economizer high limit conditions in Section 5.1.17 are not exceeded for 10 minutes, or the unit is no longer in Occupied Mode, set MaxOA-P = 100% and release the return air damper to control by the SAT control loop (i.e. return air damper position is limited by the MaxRA-P endpoint, but is not directly controlled to equal MaxRA-P).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the economizer high limit conditions in Section 5.1.17 are not exceeded for 10 minutes, or the unit is no longer in Occupied Mode, set MaxOA-P = 100% and release the return air damper to control by the SAT control loop (i.e. return air damper position is limited by the MaxRA-P endpoint, but is not directly controlled to equal MaxRA-P).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Building Static Pressure Time Averaging
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Multiple-Zone VAV Air-Handling Unit with relief fans
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Building static pressure shall be time averaged with a sliding 5-minute window and 15 second sampling rate. The averaged value is used for control.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Building static pressure shall be time averaged with a sliding 5-minute window and 15 second sampling rate (to dampen fluctuations). The averaged value shall be that displayed and used for control. Where multiple building pressure sensors are used, each shall be time-averaged and the highest of the averaged values for sensors within a pressure zone shall be used for control.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Building static pressure shall be time averaged with a sliding 5-minute window and 15 second sampling rate (to dampen fluctuations). The averaged value shall be that displayed and used for control. Where multiple building pressure sensors are used, each shall be time-averaged and the highest of the averaged values for sensors within a pressure zone shall be used for control.

structured_payload_candidate.title: AFDD FC#6: OA Fraction Error

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches to force HW valve full open/closed, CHW valve full open/closed, interlocked to plant level.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Provide software switches that interlock to a CHW and hot-water plant level to a. force HW valve full open if there is a hot-water coil, b. force HW valve full closed if there is a hot-water coil, c. force CHW valve full open, and d. force CHW valve full closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Chilled-Water Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send 3 requests if SAT exceeds SATSP by 3°C for 2 minutes; else send 2 requests if exceeds by 2°C for 2 minutes; else send 1 request if CHW valve > 95% until < 85%; else send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: SAT exceeds SATSP by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes, or by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes, or CHW valve position > 95%.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: If the supply air temperature exceeds the supply air temperature setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes, send 3 requests. Else if the supply air temperature exceeds the supply air temperature setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes, send 2 requests. Else if the CHW valve position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the CHW valve position is less than 85%. Else if the CHW valve position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the supply air temperature exceeds the supply air temperature setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes, send 3 requests. Else if the supply air temperature exceeds the supply air temperature setpoint by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes, send 2 requests. Else if the CHW valve position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the CHW valve position is less than 85%. Else if the CHW valve position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
